Bash(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-learnings-log '{""skill"":""plan-eng-review"",""type"":""architecture"",""key"":""prr-table-vs-column-addition"",""insight"":""When adding per-response data to a per-brand model, consider whether a separate response table is worth the migration complexity. The architectural value \(analysis per-response\) may justify it, but the simpler alternative \(add columns to existing table\) delivers same user value with 40% less work."",""confidence"":8,""source"":""cross-model"",""files"":[""backend/app/models/models.py"",""backend/app/services/audit_service.py""]}')

Bash(__NEW_LINE_03ee2c2f59dccc9a__ ~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-learnings-log '{""skill"":""plan-eng-review"",""type"":""pitfall"",""key"":""source-citation-upsert-race"",""insight"":""SourceCitation upsert must use INSERT ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE, not SELECT+INSERT. Concurrent platform responses citing the same domain will race on the upsert. MySQL unique index prevents duplicates but the INSERT will fail without the ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE clause."",""confidence"":10,""source"":""cross-model"",""files"":[""backend/app/services/audit_service.py""]}')

Bash(__NEW_LINE_03ee2c2f59dccc9a__ ~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-learnings-log '{""skill"":""plan-eng-review"",""type"":""pitfall"",""key"":""alembic-stamp-head-before-migration"",""insight"":""When schema was created via init_db.sql \(not Alembic\), the alembic_version table may not exist or may be stale. Must run alembic stamp head before creating new migrations. Otherwise migration fails."",""confidence"":9,""source"":""cross-model"",""files"":[""backend/alembic/versions/918c19406f61_initial.py"",""backend/init_db.sql""]}')
